_readme: This is the ONLY file you edit day to day. To add a competitor or feed, add one line to the relevant category's 'sources' array. Three source types: {type:'rss', name:'...', url:'...'} for a direct feed; {type:'googlenews', query:'...'} for any news/blog by keyword; {type:'arxiv', cats:['cs.AI','cs.DB']} for research papers. 'name' is optional and just sets the source label shown on the card.

categories.label: What's new in AI 🤖
categories._note: The Anthropic/Mistral/xAI 'rss' feeds below are COMMUNITY-maintained scrapers (raw.githubusercontent.com/Olshansk/rss-feeds), updated hourly — free, no setup, but third-party, so they can lag or break if that repo stops. The durable upgrade later is to self-host RSSHub (free on Cloudflare Workers) and point these URLs at your own instance. Native vendor feeds (OpenAI, Google AI, Vertex AI) are first-party and most reliable.
_todo_feeds_with_no_native_rss: Nebius blog (nebius.com/blog): no native feed found (only a service-status feed). Needs a scraper feed — self-hosted RSSHub or a generator like RSS.app — then add as {type:'rss', name:'Nebius', url:'<feed>'}.
Microsoft AI (microsoft.ai/news, microsoft.ai/blog) and the Azure Foundry 'what's new' Learn page: JS sites with no native feed; need a scraper feed.
Azure alternative: azure.microsoft.com/en-us/blog/feed/ IS a native feed, but covers ALL of Azure (noisy for an AI tab). Add only if you want it; relevance filtering (Phase 2) would help trim it.
For now, Anthropic/Mistral/xAI/DeepSeek/Nebius/Azure are still covered by the googlenews queries below.

sources.query: Anthropic Claude release OR launch OR update
"Mistral AI" model OR release OR launch
xAI Grok release OR launch OR update
DeepSeek AI model OR release OR launch
Nebius AI launch OR release OR funding
"Azure AI" OR "Azure OpenAI" launch OR update

categories.label: Competitors 👀
categories._note: Per-company PRODUCT RELEASES come from changelog feeds (type:rss) where the vendor's docs platform exposes one natively: Lovable & Relevance AI (Mintlify -> /rss.xml), Cohere (Fern -> /changelog.rss), Dust (ReadMe -> /changelog.rss). The googlenews queries cover funding/growth/strategy (changelogs rarely make the news). Changelogs with NO native feed (need a scraper feed -- self-hosted RSSHub or RSS.app -- before adding as rss): Glean (Docusaurus), Langdock (Webflow), Stack AI & V7 (Framer), Nexos, Kore AI (Mintlify but no Update components = empty feed), Harvey (custom Next.js), GetGuru (ReadMe docs page + being migrated to a new platform).
